name: accent-button
description: Shared outline-accent action button renderer (AccentButton; renamed from BeaconButton in v0.24.0). Any blueprint creating an outline-accent action button calls customJS.AccentButton.render(parent, opts) instead of inline cssText + hover handlers. opts: {label, icon, onClick, flex?, disabled?, tone?}. tone reserved for future additive tones; only 'accent' valid at v0.1.0 (this mechanism's launch version). Returns HTMLButtonElement; callers may mutate btn.disabled post-render (hover handlers honor it).
